name: Performly Talent
description: Transform your Workplace Productivity & Engagement Learn more about Performly Talent

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: Amazing interface , timesheet feature and easy use of it.
reviews.review_cons: awesome project having many new features.

reviews.review_description: It is the best software I used so far. Keep up the good work.
reviews.review_pros: It has news section, and a discussion board to speak anonymously. Has many features, all merged to one place. Handles out company services all in one place, as for example: vacations, news, handbook, pay slip, development plans, our employee reviews and also needed information about the company.
reviews.review_cons: It needs to be organized, pay more attention to your frontend design and ways of handling user validation errors.

reviews.review_pros: - Features - Performly Talent - Meeting room module - Attendance and leave managements - Responsive (Mobile and Desktop)
reviews.review_cons: - UI - Performance - Unused gadgets - Design

reviews.review_pros: Very good management solution can be used daily to be able to sign in and sign out for example and submit vacation request
reviews.review_cons: Some little bit it hangs in view times nothing else

reviews.review_title: good product, easy to use and helpful
reviews.review_pros: easy to migrate KPIs from one year to another without need to rewrite them again
reviews.review_cons: nothing at all, maybe the leave tab, need to be more enhanced from UX perspective

reviews.review_pros: The ease of use, the over all experience
reviews.review_cons: I’d like to see some changes in the layout

reviews.review_title: Good Application but with some Cons
reviews.review_pros: Performly has a friendly UI in addition to ease of usage, also multiple feature and capabilities to handle different business requirements, email notifications and security management.
reviews.review_cons: Some core features are not available, for example editing profile info, main page organizing, navigation between sections, highlighting what's new/updated in company policy.

reviews.review_pros: performly has simple interface and easy to handle dauly tasks
reviews.review_cons: till the moment there is nothing from my view need to be improved

reviews.review_pros: the ease of use and availability of the important insights
reviews.review_cons: Nothing to be mentioned, everything is good

reviews.review_pros: it helped us to organize our attendance, vacations, appraisals and tracking our payrolls remotely
reviews.review_cons: the user experience is not that great and I feel that everything is stacked and hidden in a lot of tabs

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: simple GUI and visibility over my organization.
reviews.review_cons: The is cross-platform accessing it from anywhere any time.

reviews.review_description: it was very very very good
reviews.review_pros: easy yo use , more understandable and comfortable
reviews.review_cons: nothing may be are good to find things good

reviews.review_description: Performly has competitive edges based on the new trends in performance management that makes it unique. it facilitates ongoing feedback and focuses on objectives and results. the platform is user friendly and flexible to adapt with different Performance management processes. I highly recommend Performly.
reviews.review_pros: - Ongoing feedback - User friendly - flexibility to add new features

reviews.review_description: Loved the experience with Performly, it is accessible from anywhere and fits our dynamic culture and its so easy to use and very clear

reviews.review_title: Very much user friendly with microscopic view on each content domain.
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: Each sectors are grabbed with definite purpose. For accessibility various methods are available with ease of use.
reviews.review_cons: As a terminal accessibility by anyone from anywhere the SMS and App feature is somewhat to be enhanced.

reviews.author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Performly is a great tool which is based on the most recent performance management tools and techniques, it reinforce the team spirit and encourages people to interact proactively leading to a heathy corporate culture.

reviews.review_title: A streamlined tool for performance-Driven Teams
reviews.review_description: Overall, my experience with performly talent has been very positive, it's a cost-effective solution that delivers strong value for money, especially for small to life-sized companies. The performance management features are robust .
reviews.review_pros: What stood out the most was its ease of use and inituitive interface . Setting up performance reviews and 360⁰ feedback cycles was simple and efficient. The feedback tools were especially helpful in fostering a culture of continuous improvement.
reviews.review_cons: While performly talent covers performance management well , its candidate process features are somewhat limited . It doesn't offer a full applicant tracking system (ATS) .

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_description: Performly is a feature-rich and flexible performance management tool that helps organizations monitor and evaluate performance. While it lacks some features and needs improvement, overall, it's a very satisfying solution.
reviews.review_pros: It's great to be able to handle a variety of requests and support my daily tasks effectively.
reviews.review_cons: My biggest disappointment is that it can't be email.

reviews.review_title: A broad range of features implemented well
reviews.review_pros: I have been using performly for years as part of my daily routine at the company I work at. The solution has a lot of features. It covers nearly every aspect required for the everyday periodic routine of every employee, and it does it well. From attendance, to vacations, to compensation, to travel, to performance reviews, to announcements ... etc; so many to count. Everything is clear and easy to use.
reviews.review_cons: Taking into account the breadth of features, there is bound to be this rare feature that is not up to par. For example, the notifications menu in the Talent module is lackluster. It does not link to the task, and there is no option to set all as 'read'. In addition, the reports could use more details from the performance submitted.

reviews.review_title: A malleable system for administering appraisals of employees' performance
reviews.review_description: With Performly, we have enhanced the concepts of governance and transparency with performance monitoring and evaluation, and it is great that we have been able to exchange feedback and create goals and surveys, which enable us to make improvements to our performance continuously.
reviews.review_pros: It is good that with Performly we can hold direct 1X1 sessions to review performance and set a list of goals that should be achieved within a specific period of time, as well as discuss plans that will enable us to achieve them. I like the fact that Performly provides a lot of organized dashboards, which show many analyzes of the various performance measures approved by the organization’s management and through which we can know the amount of improvement in performance and the level of progress in achieving the goals and plans agreed upon between members and their direct managers.
reviews.review_cons: I didn't run into any difficulties with Performly; I was having minor content formatting issues, which got worked around with practice.

reviews.review_title: Performly our day to day signing in service
reviews.review_pros: evaluation system planning and objectives easy to use and user friendly
reviews.review_cons: being integrated with other systems it does not work as intended maybe just maybe its a problem with the other integrated SW!

reviews.review_pros: Easy objective settings , with due dates, weight , key results and milestones Ability to add different competencies 360 reviews is a great option (Self Review, Sub Review, Reverse Review, Peers Review) feedback feature is very good ( to give an employee a feedback and link it to an objective and set it's visibility too (Public or Private (Manager only) Private (One To One))
reviews.review_cons: It has some usability issues that needs to be fixed ( for example to view previous evaluations for subs , its hard to reach it ) Reports are basic , could be better

reviews.review_title: Great software that fits most of the companies
reviews.review_pros: Ease of Use Login anywhere Friendly Interface
reviews.review_cons: Sometimes you might find basic features are not there

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: i like that i can submit requests to any department including HR , Printings , asking for vacation or asking business cards or even travel tickets all in in one app and highly responsive
reviews.review_cons: its not including emailing feature , however i am satisfied

reviews.review_title: Great changes noticed since we implemented
reviews.review_description: Overall, it was a great experience both as an administrator and user giving and receiving feedback.
reviews.review_pros: - Decluttered user interface and product experience - Flexible solution for various scenarios for objectives, key performance indicators (KPIs) and individual team-member goals - Accessible across various devices
reviews.review_cons: Honestly, there isn't much to complain about except maybe the limited features available when offline, which can be a pain for often than you think
